creator: gavin.atkinson@ury.york.ac.uk
text:
Hi,

Please supply the output of "dmesg" and "pciconf -l" from this server.
If "dmesg" doesn't give all of the boot messages, you should find them
in /var/run/dmesg.boot.  Also, can you confirm that PR amd64/107345 is a
duplicate of this?

Thanks,

Gavin
